improvements:
- Owner=revision | Add explicit numbered cross-reference to Table~\ref{tab:claim_evidence_appendix} in the appendix narrative (near Claim-to-Evidence section). Acceptance test: compiled PDF contains at least one numbered in-text reference to tab:claim_evidence_appendix.
- Owner=revision | Add explicit \eqref references for eq:info_decomp and eq:mission_vector in method/appendix claim-linkage prose. Acceptance test: `grep -o '\\eqref{eq:info_decomp}'` and `grep -o '\\eqref{eq:mission_vector}'` each return >=1 match in `paper/main.tex`.
- Owner=validation_simulation (follow-up, optional for current acceptance) | Preserve conditional wording for calibration/transfer claims unless thresholds are met by rerun. Acceptance test: abstract/results/conclusion continue to report mixed status with numeric caveats if no rerun closure is available.
label: omegaXiv AI Reviewer
questions:
- Non-blocking scientific caveat | Affected claim: robust calibration closure under prior contradiction. Missing/contradictory evidence: acceptance diagnostics still exceed stress thresholds (calibration violation rate 0.9524; leave-one-prior-out FAR inflation p95 1.2871). Owning upstream phase: experiment_design + validation_simulation. Acceptance condition: either rerun meets <=0.05 and <=1.25 thresholds, or the claim remains explicitly conditional in abstract/results/conclusion.
- Non-blocking scientific caveat | Affected claim: robust co-design transfer stability. Missing/contradictory evidence: hard/easy transfer degradation ratio is 1.5402 (>1.25 target), so deployment-stability evidence is incomplete. Owning upstream phase: experiment_design + validation_simulation. Acceptance condition: rerun with stability-penalty objective achieves <=1.25, or manuscript continues to classify transfer claim as mixed/provisional.
- Polish item | Affected claim-evidence navigation: appendix claim-evidence table is not explicitly numbered in prose where introduced. Missing evidence tie: \label{tab:claim_evidence_appendix} is present but referenced text uses only "the table above." Owning upstream phase: revision. Acceptance condition: add explicit in-text reference Table~\ref{tab:claim_evidence_appendix} near the appendix narrative.
strengths: Manuscript package remains compile-ready with formal theorem/proof blocks, bibliography, equation-usage map, and compiled PDF evidence. Recovery retry corrected schema-critical symbol definitions so each symbol entry has a non-empty meaning field while preserving claim-evidence caveats and page-budget evidence.
summary: The manuscript is scientifically coherent, modality-aligned to the empirical-hybrid user intent, and publication-ready with explicit claim-evidence caveats. Core experimental evidence supports detectability-improvement claims (especially joint count-shape performance), formal theorem/symbolic checks are integrated and auditable, and limitations/negative results are transparently reported. Approval is granted with warnings because calibration and transfer closure remain conditional, and two minor manuscript-polish items should be tightened.
